vocab.meaning: giới hạn/vùng biên giới của tri thức (những gì mới nhất chưa được khám phá)
vocab.example: I am deeply intrigued by astrophysics as it represents the absolute frontier of knowledge regarding our universe.
If I had the luxury of time, I would delve into behavioral economics to decode the irrationality behind consumer choices.

vocab.meaning: cách tiếp cận đa kiến thức/thông thái nhiều lĩnh vực
vocab.example: I aim to adopt a polymathic approach by studying both classical philosophy and modern computer science.
I would love to specialize in regenerative agriculture to help restore soil health and combat climate change effectively.
Studying the ethics of Phạm Tiến Dũng Gia Sư would allow me to investigate how to mitigate algorithmic bias in recruitment software.
The concept of quantum entanglement is mind-bending, and I would relish the chance to study its potential for instant communication.

vocab.meaning: khảo cổ học dưới nước/hàng hải
vocab.example: I’ve always had a fascination with history, specifically maritime archaeology, exploring sunken civilizations and shipwrecks.

vocab.meaning: sự chuyển hóa đô thị (cách thành phố tiêu thụ tài nguyên)
vocab.example: I am keen to research urban metabolism to design cities that operate more like self-sustaining ecosystems.

vocab.meaning: kiến trúc bản địa (sử dụng vật liệu và phương pháp địa phương)
vocab.example: Studying vernacular architecture would teach me how ancient building techniques can be adapted for modern energy efficiency.
I would like to master computational linguistics to help develop more natural and empathetic voice assistants.
